notes: Multiple duplicate variable declarations cause SyntaxErrors, an unclosed string literal in localStorage.setItem, undefined updateBullets function, and mismatched braces make this game completely non-functional.
The game fails to run entirely due to multiple fatal syntax errors, including redeclared variables and unclosed strings.

The build is broken by fatal JavaScript syntax/runtime issues including duplicate let declarations and an unterminated localStorage.setItem string, so it does not run and cannot be fairly credited for controls, visuals, or gameplay.
